Singapore.currency_strength: Very Strong (SGD to MYR at historic highs)
Singapore.key_opportunity: Singapore's premium consumer market values traceability and sustainability — Sarawak organic produce carries natural premium.

Brunei.key_opportunity: Small market but high per-capita spending. Halal certification is mandatory — ensure JAKIM halal logo compliance.

Indonesia.key_opportunity: Massive 275M population with growing middle class. West Kalimantan border trade is a low-barrier entry point for Sarawak MSMEs.

Thailand.key_opportunity: Thai consumers value exotic Borneo products. Sarawak pepper and wild honey have strong positioning in Bangkok's premium retail.

Philippines.key_opportunity: Fast-growing economy with strong e-commerce adoption. Shopee/Lazada cross-border listings can reach Filipino consumers directly.

Vietnam.key_opportunity: Fastest-growing ASEAN economy. Vietnam's manufacturing sector drives demand for raw materials. CPTPP membership means preferential tariffs.
